choose_language: Choose your preferred language for the app.
connect_collar_desc: Connect your pet's HavaPaw collar to view real-time GPS location here.
connect_smartwatch: Connect smartwatch to see activity data
add_first_pet: Go to Profile to add your first pet!
remove_pet_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {petName}? This cannot be undone.
choose_notifications: Choose which notifications you want to receive.
alert_leaves_zone: Alert when pet leaves safe zone
alert_battery_low: Alert when collar battery is low
information_collect_content: HavaPaw collects information you provide directly, including your name, email address, and pet information. We also collect data from connected devices such as smartwatches and GPS collars.
use_information_content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, track your pet's health and location, send notifications about your pet's status, and communicate with you about our services.
data_security_content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. All data is stored securely using Firebase's security features and encrypted in transit.
data_sharing_content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who assist us in operating our app, subject to strict confidentiality agreements.
your_rights_content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through the app settings or by contacting our support team.
contact_us_content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@havapaw.com
acceptance_terms_content: By downloading and using HavaPaw, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our app.
use_license_content: HavaPaw grants you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the app for personal, non-commercial purposes in accordance with these terms.
user_responsibilities_content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
pet_tracking_content: Our GPS tracking services are provided on a best-effort basis. We do not guarantee 100% accuracy or real-time updates due to factors such as GPS signal availability, network connectivity, and device battery life.
health_monitoring_content: Health data provided by smartwatches is for informational purposes only and should not be used as a substitute for professional veterinary advice. Always consult with your veterinarian for health concerns.
limitation_liability_content: HavaPaw shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services, including but not limited to loss of pet data or health information.
modifications_terms_content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the app after modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
contact_us_tos_content: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at support@havapaw.com
change_password_desc: Enter your current password and new password to update your account.
change_email_desc: Enter your new email and current password to update your account.
pet_within_zone: Pet is within the safe zone
configure_safe_zone: Configure a safe zone for your pet
connect_collar_gps: Connect your pet's HavaPaw collar to view real-time GPS location here.
safe_zone_desc: Set a safe zone for your pet. You'll be notified if they leave this area.
pet_id_missing: Pet ID is missing. Cannot add medication.
delete_medication_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this medication?
connect_smartwatch_desc: Connect your smartwatch or manually enter watch data to see health metrics here.
connect_smartwatch_health_desc: Connect a smartwatch or manually enter watch data to see your pet's health metrics.
create_account_desc: Create your account to get started
password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
